meaning: adv.热心地,热情地,积极地,狂热地
examples: The males guard their mates zealously.
He believed zealously in both God and Brazil.
Koch Industries zealously guards its public image.
He lives in a relatively modest apartment in South Mumbai and zealously guards his privacy.
Ms Harman said anonymity for families and children involved in hearings had to be "zealously" enforced.
